name: Cmaa Heritage Crest
concept: Circular crest — 'CMAA' arched in tracked Fraunces caps over a clean Archimedean chakli-spiral medallion, fine triple rings, 'HANDMADE · SMALL BATCH' along the bottom arc, curry-leaf sprigs at 3 & 9 o'clock, sesame seeds and an 'EST. 2026' banner. Classic, balanced, premium trust-seal.

name: Cmaa Chakli Wax Seal
concept: Wax-seal spiral mark — a tactile, subtly irregular wax-seal disc with a radial-gradient body and a gold beaded ring, the hand-pressed chakli spiral as the hero. Iconic and scalable as an app icon, foil emboss or packaging tape. Reverse is a true gold-on-ink foil treatment.

name: Cmaa Maker's Label
concept: Artisanal rectangular label / maker's stamp — a double-bordered card with vintage corner ornaments, 'Cmaa' in Fraunces, an italic 'Homemade Chakli & Chivda' descriptor, a diamond-centred rule, a tiny spiral, and stamped microtext ('SINCE 2026 · SMALL BATCH' / 'NO PRESERVATIVES · PRESSED BY HAND'). Reads like a real craft ingredient label.
